tasks.title: Write Dockerfile for static HTML project
tasks.description:
Create a Dockerfile in the project root (/Users/one-don/.eunomia/workspace/Man2/Dockerfile). The project is a static HTML site (index.html). Use nginx:alpine as the base image to serve the static files. Copy index.html into /usr/share/nginx/html/. Expose port 80. The default nginx CMD is sufficient — no override needed. Example structure:

FROM nginx:alpine
COPY index.html /usr/share/nginx/html/index.html
EXPOSE 80

No tests are required for a Dockerfile; verify the file is syntactically valid and follows best practices (minimal image, explicit COPY, correct EXPOSE).
